pageProps.data:
要素
起始值和终止值

起始值就是起始坐标，中点就是终止时目标

插值

在动画过程中，从起始值到终点值的变化由插值器产生。插值器是追着时间生成的动画的中间状态。

插值分为匀速插值和变速插值。

动画时长

动画的总时间。

帧

屏幕是以帧进行渲染的，每秒的帧数被称为帧率。

AnimationController 动画控制器

其职责是控制动画的执行，传入两个参数，一个是 duration 控制时长，另一个是 vsync 是一个特殊值，用于优化动画的资源。

通过 AnimationController 的 forward 启动动画。

_controller = AnimationController(vsync: this,duration: Duration(seconds: 3),);_controller.forward();
Tween

规定动画的初始和结束值：

_controller = AnimationController(vsync: this,duration: Duration(seconds: 3),);var animation = Tween(begin: 0.0, end: 100.0).animate(_controller);
CurvedAnimation 变速插值

匀速：

@overridevoid initState() {super.initState();_controller = AnimationController(vsync: this,duration: Duration(seconds: 3),); var animation = Tween(begin: 0.0, end: 100.0).animate(_controller);animation.addListener(() {this.setState(() {left = animation.value;});});_controller.forward();}

变速：

@overridevoid initState() {super.initState();_controller = AnimationController(vsync: this,duration: Duration(seconds: 3),); var animation = Tween(begin: 0.0, end: 100.0).animate(CurvedAnimation(parent: _controller,curve: Curves.bounceInOut,));animation.addListener(() {this.setState(() {left = animation.value;});});_controller.forward();}
一个会动的红色 Container
class AnimationControllerMode extends StatefulWidget {const AnimationControllerMode({super.key});@overrideState<AnimationControllerMode> createState() =>_AnimationControllerModeState();}class _AnimationControllerModeState extends State<AnimationControllerMode>with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {// ignore: unused_fieldlate AnimationController _controller;double left = 0;@overridevoid initState() {super.initState();_controller = AnimationController(vsync: this,duration: Duration(seconds: 3),);var animation = Tween(begin: 0.0, end: 100.0).animate(_controller);animation.addListener(() {this.setState(() {left = animation.value;});});_controller.forward();}@overridevoid dispose() {_controller.dispose();super.dispose();}@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Stack(children: [Positioned(left: left,child: Container(width: 100,height: 100,color: Colors.red,))],);}}
TickerProvider 渲染机制

动画刷新频率过低，对使用者不友好；频率高于设备的刷新频率，会出现性能损耗。所以使用 AnimatedBuilder 高效开发动画，flutter 提供了一种简单高效的方案即 AnimatedBuilder 。

一个会动的代码量少的 Container
class AnimatedBuildModel extends StatefulWidget {const AnimatedBuildModel({super.key});@overrideState<AnimatedBuildModel> createState() => _AnimatedBuildModelState();}class _AnimatedBuildModelState extends State<AnimatedBuildModel> {@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Stack(children: [TweenAnimationBuilder(tween: Tween(begin: 0.0, end: 100.0),duration: Duration(seconds: 3),builder: ((context, value, child) => Positioned(child: Container(width: value,height: value,color: Color(0xff99ffff),),left: value,)),)],);}}
pageProps.title: 动画
